---
description: "Request a semantic model change or report modification from the engineering team. Tracks the request in data files."
agent: "report-requests"
---

Help me create a data/report request for the engineering team.

1. Ask me what change is needed (or use the details below)
2. Determine the type: Semantic model change / New report / Report modification / Data fix
3. Draft a clear, specific request with:
   - What needs to change
   - Why (business justification)
   - Expected outcome
   - Priority and timeline
4. Log the request in `data/metrics/requests.md`
5. Optionally draft an email to the engineering team

Request details: {{describe the change needed}}
